mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.user_avatar AS userAvatar, p.title, p.content, p.category, p.tags, p.cover_url AS coverUrl, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.is_top AS isTop, p.is_hot AS isHot, p.status, p.create_time AS createTime, p.update_time AS updateTime, CASE WHEN pl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isLiked FROM tb_community_post p LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN tb_post_like pl ON p.id = pl.post_id AND pl.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE p.status = 1
AND p.category = #{category}
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND p.tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tag}, '%')
AND p.user_id = #{userId}
AND p.is_hot = 1
ORDER BY
p.like_count DESC, p.view_count DESC, p.create_time DESC
p.view_count DESC, p.create_time DESC
p.is_top DESC, p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.user_avatar AS userAvatar, p.title, p.content, p.category, p.tags, p.cover_url AS coverUrl, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.is_top AS isTop, p.is_hot AS isHot, p.status, p.create_time AS createTime, p.update_time AS updateTime, CASE WHEN pl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isLiked FROM tb_community_post p LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN tb_post_like pl ON p.id = pl.post_id AND pl.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE p.id = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_community_post SET comment_count = comment_count - 1 WHERE id = #{postId} AND comment_count > 0
